suites.name: esoteric-seed-v1
suites.description: A 50-problem exact-answer benchmark spanning directmates, selfmates, reflexmates, helpmates, series movers, and proof games. Every stored solution passes its native stipulation verifier.

suites.name: esoteric-seed-v2
suites.description: A 51-problem exact-answer benchmark spanning directmates, selfmates, reflexmates, helpmates, series movers, and proof games. Every stored solution is verifier-checked, and sourced historical compositions pass an explicit public-admission gate.

suites.name: esoteric-smoke-v1
suites.description: A seven-problem esoteric preflight containing one verifier-checked example of every active stipulation. It tests exact-answer parsing and grading without running the full catalogue.

suites.name: esoteric-smoke-v2
suites.description: A seven-problem esoteric preflight containing one native-verifier-checked example of every active stipulation. It tests exact-answer protocols without running the full catalogue.

suites.name: standard-lichess-v2
suites.description: A 325-position Lichess tactical benchmark covering a broad range of human-calibrated puzzle ratings and motifs. Every position meets the release's solve-count, rating-deviation, popularity, and source-game requirements.

suites.name: standard-lichess-v3
suites.description: A 325-position Lichess tactical benchmark spanning beginner through frontier difficulty. Rating-ascending order makes the point where a model begins to falter visible within each run.

suites.name: standard-lichess-v4
suites.description: A 250-position, rating-ordered Lichess tactical benchmark with exactly 25 puzzles in each of ten difficulty bands. Each band targets a diverse mix of mating, defensive, quiet, pawn, endgame, and tactical ideas while retaining strict calibration and provenance gates.

suites.name: standard-public-v1
suites.description: A 240-position public tactical benchmark sampled across human-calibrated Lichess rating buckets. It provides a reproducible Standard track with source ratings, themes, and game provenance.

suites.name: standard-seed-v1
suites.description: A 100-position seed benchmark for validating Standard puzzle selection, prompting, grading, and persistence. It spans multiple rating buckets and tactical motifs in a compact public release.

suites.name: standard-smoke-v1
suites.description: A 14-position Standard preflight suite sampled across the full rating range. It exercises every puzzle prompt and persistence path before a paid full-suite run.

suites.name: standard-smoke-v2
suites.description: A 14-position rating-ordered Standard preflight suite spanning the calibrated difficulty range. It validates multi-turn puzzle execution, grading, and durable writes at low cost.

suites.name: standard-smoke-v3
suites.description: A 20-position Standard preflight suite with two puzzles from each of the ten active rating bands. It is the smallest run that checks the current suite's full difficulty ladder.

suites.name: tactical-lichess-v1
suites.description: A 66-position legacy Lichess tactics suite used to prove the original puzzle runner. It preserves a small reproducibility fixture for early ChessBench experiments.

suites.name: tactical-public-v1
suites.description: A 96-position legacy public tactics suite spanning multiple rating buckets. It preserves the task set used by the first points-based puzzle experiments.

suites.name: woodpecker-masters-v1
suites.description: A 135-position full-line calculation benchmark drawn from titled-player games. Models must return each complete forced UCI variation in one response, with positions editorially divided into Easy, Medium, and Hard sections.

suites.name: woodpecker-public-v1
suites.description: A 120-position one-shot calculation benchmark built from longer Lichess tactical lines. Models return the complete variation, including forced opponent replies, and receive prefix credit for correct solver moves.

suites.name: woodpecker-seed-v1
suites.description: A 60-position seed suite for one-shot full-variation calculation. It validates longer-line prompting, UCI sequence parsing, and prefix scoring across multiple difficulty levels.

suites.name: woodpecker-smoke-v1
suites.description: A six-position full-line calculation preflight with two puzzles from each Easy, Medium, and Hard section. It validates one-shot variation parsing and prefix scoring.
